---
applyTo: "**/*"
---

# Learning Garden Capture Instructions

When the user asks to capture reusable knowledge from a session, or when you notice a reusable pattern worth proposing, read and follow:

- `skills/learning-garden-capture/SKILL.md`

Do not promote captures into `wiki/`. Write approved captures to `learning/inbox/agent-captures/<slug>/packet-export.md` for later packet normalization and review.

In downstream work gardens, never prepare exports, patches, summaries, or prompts that move work-specific knowledge out of the work environment.
